afterFileEdit.command: sh -lc 'FILE="$CURSOR_FILEPATH"; case "$FILE" in */prisma/schema.prisma) echo "{\"agentMessage\": \"IMPORTANT: You just modified the Prisma schema. You MUST run 'npx prisma migrate dev --name <descriptive-name>' to create a migration, then 'npx prisma generate' to update the TypeScript types. Do NOT forget this step or the app will break.\"}" ;; */apps/backend/src/*.controller.ts) echo "{\"agentMessage\": \"You modified a controller. Verify: (1) Swagger decorators are present (@ApiTags, @ApiOperation, @ApiResponse), (2) the corresponding service has Prometheus metrics and structured logging, (3) error cases return appropriate HTTP status codes.\"}" ;; esac'

beforeShellExecution.command: sh -lc 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"command":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"command":"//;s/"$//'); case "$CMD" in *password*|*secret*|*token*|*API_KEY*) echo "{\"continue\": false, \"permission\": \"deny\", \"userMessage\": \"Blocked: This command appears to contain or expose a secret.\", \"agentMessage\": \"Do not hardcode secrets in commands. Use environment variables from .env instead.\"}" ;; *) echo "{\"continue\": true}" ;; esac'
